# Dissolution Trapping

**Summary**: The trapping of CO2 through its dissolution into the formation brine.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] analyzed dissolution_trapping as a mechanism that increases in proportion to mineral dissolution.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] Important for long-term storage in saline aquifers.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] Calculated from simulation results.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Injection into the bottom interval results in higher percentages of dissolution trapping. ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 120]])
